description.value: OSR JEWELLERS, a premier jewelry store in Delhi, presents a captivating array of exquisite pieces. Their collection features stunning Yellow Opal and Diamond necklace sets, pure 92.5 silver jewelry, and beautifully crafted gold-plated earrings, including traditional Kundan and Jadau designs. They offer a diverse selection to adorn every occasion.

media_assets.product_name: Yellow Opal Diamond Classic Necklace Set

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: matching necklace and earrings, multiple stones

media_assets.visual_description: A model with dark hair and a light-colored top wears a striking necklace and matching dangle earrings. The jewelry features numerous colorless or near-colorless round brilliant stones set in a white metal, accented with pear-shaped fancy yellow stones. The background is a plain, light grey studio setting, highlighting the jewelry and model.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Model wearing a dazzling necklace and matching dangle earrings featuring colorless round brilliant and fancy yellow pear-shaped stones.

media_assets.product_name: Yellow Diamond Silver Plated Necklace Set

visual_features.color_appearance: fancy yellow (main stones), colorless/near-colorless (smaller accent stones)
visual_features.clarity_appearance: eye-clean (main stones), not discernible (smaller accent stones)
visual_features.setting_or_mounting: necklace, drop earrings, prong set, cluster setting
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: The necklace has a central pendant and two smaller accent stones along the chain. The earrings are a matching drop style.

media_assets.visual_description: A silver-toned necklace and matching earrings set is displayed on a plain white background. The necklace features a long chain adorned with small, colorless stones, leading to a prominent square-shaped pendant with a large fancy yellow stone surrounded by smaller colorless stones. Two smaller round fancy yellow stones are also integrated into the necklace chain. The accompanying drop earrings mirror the design of the main pendant, each featuring a fancy yellow stone surrounded by colorless stones.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Silver-toned necklace and matching drop earrings set with fancy yellow rectangular stones and clear round accent stones.

media_assets.product_name: White Ruby & Green Jadau Chand Bali

visual_features.setting_or_mounting: drop earrings, bezel/prong set (small stones), strung (pearls)
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Intricate traditional design, multiple small colored stones, numerous pearl drops, highly decorative.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of ornate gold-toned Chand Bali earrings against a plain white background. Each earring features a crescent-shaped hoop adorned with small red and green stones, intricate gold detailing, and numerous white pearl drops dangling from the bottom edge. A decorative floral-like element with red and green stones connects the hoop to the earring hook, with an additional small green stone cluster suspended within the hoop.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of ornate gold-toned Chand Bali earrings with red and green stones, intricate detailing, and white pearl drops.

visual_features.clarity_appearance: eye-clean (for visible larger stones), small inclusions not discernible for pavé
visual_features.setting_or_mounting: stud earrings, prong set, pavé set
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: two earrings, symmetrical design, multiple types of stones

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of symmetrical flower-shaped stud earrings against a plain white background. Each earring features a central round clear stone surrounded by six pear-shaped pink stones, forming the inner petals. The outer petals are entirely covered in small, pavé-set clear or white stones, all set in a bright gold-toned metal.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of gold-toned flower-shaped stud earrings with pink pear-shaped stones and pavé-set clear stones on a white background.

visual_features.color_appearance: white/colorless (main stones), deep red (dangling beads), white (pearls)
visual_features.clarity_appearance: eye-clean (white stones appear opaque/foil-backed), opaque/translucent (red beads)
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Intricate traditional design, multiple types of stones/beads, kundan-style appearance for white stones.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of ornate, gold-toned chandelier-style earrings against a plain white background. Each earring features a fan-shaped design adorned with numerous bezel-set, flat-cut white stones, surrounded by intricate metalwork. Dangling from the bottom are clusters of small, deep red oval beads and tiny white pearls, adding a vibrant contrast to the overall design.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of ornate gold-toned chandelier earrings with white flat-cut stones, red oval beads, and small white pearls.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: intricate beaded metalwork on edges, multiple stones

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of gold-toned half-hoop earrings, each adorned with multiple clear, roundish stones set along its curved surface. The metalwork features intricate beaded detailing along the edges, and the earrings are presented against a clean, bright white background.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Pair of gold half-hoop earrings with multiple clear, round stones set along the curve, featuring beaded metalwork.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: textured/beaded edge on the metal setting

media_assets.visual_description: Two gold-toned stud earrings are displayed against a plain white background. Each earring features a large, irregularly shaped, clear gemstone, possibly a polki diamond or crystal, set in a textured bezel of yellow metal. The gemstones exhibit good transparency and reflect light, showing facets or internal structure.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of gold-toned stud earrings with large, irregularly shaped, clear gemstones set in textured bezels on a white background.

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Traditional Jadau style jewelry, multiple green stones and pearls, adjustable yellow dori (cord) with red and green tassels on the necklace.

media_assets.visual_description: A smiling woman with dark hair pulled back models a traditional gold-toned necklace set. The necklace features ornate oval-shaped links, each adorned with a central green stone, likely an emerald, surrounded by intricate gold work and small white pearls dangling below. Matching chandelier-style earrings with green stones and multiple pearl drops complete the set, presented against a soft, light-colored background.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Smiling woman wearing a traditional gold-toned Jadau necklace set with green emerald-like stones and white pearl drops.

visual_features.shape_visible: V-shape (necklace), chandelier/drop (earrings), small round/oval pearls, small multi-colored gemstones (likely cabochons or rose cuts)
visual_features.color_appearance: multi-color (red, green, blue/turquoise gemstones), white (pearls), yellow gold
visual_features.setting_or_mounting: necklace, drop earrings, stones appear set within intricate gold work or enamel
visual_features.presentation: hand model, studio lighting, neutral background
visual_features.additional_visual_notes: traditional Indian Jadau style, intricate enamel work, multiple small pearls, matching set

media_assets.visual_description: A smiling woman with dark hair pulled back models a multi-color Jadau necklace set. The necklace is a broad, V-shaped collar design adorned with small red, green, and blue gemstones, intricate gold work, and a fringe of small white pearls. Matching chandelier-style earrings with similar gemstones, gold detailing, and pearl drops complement the necklace. The model wears a cream-colored saree with a gold border, and the background features soft, diffused studio lighting.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Smiling woman models a multi-color Jadau necklace and matching chandelier earrings with red, green, blue gems and pearls.

The box features a textured, possibly faux leather, exterior and silver-toned metal hardware including latches and corner protectors. The background is softly blurred, showing parts of a traditional embroidered garment and warm, diffused lighting, suggesting a styled lifestyle presentation.

reviews.author: Ipshita Mukherjee
reviews.text:
had an absolutely wonderful experience at OSR Jewellers. From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel genuinely welcomed and valued. Their customer service is truly exceptional patient, knowledgeable, and never pushy. They took the time to understand exactly what I was looking for and showed me beautiful options.

What really stood out was their attention to detail and transparency while explaining the designs, quality, and pricing. The entire process felt smooth, comfortable, and trustworthy. It’s rare to find such a perfect balance of professionalism and warmth.

Highly recommend OSR Jewellers for anyone looking for stunning pieces and outstanding customer service. I will definitely be coming back!
reviews.owner_response: We are truly grateful for your kind words. At OSR JEWELLERS, we strive for excellence in both craftsmanship and service, and your feedback is a beautiful testament to those efforts. It was a privilege to assist you with your jewelry needs. We look forward to being part of your story for years to come and hope to see you again soon.

reviews.author: Jasmine Gujral
reviews.text:
Amazing place with such beautiful variety of jewellery, Kartik n his team were so warm n welcoming, felt like home. Would recomend everyone to visit atleast once, because, you're bound to visit again!
Thank you to the entire team at OSR jewellers for being so friendly n understanding the need n providing me with what I had come looking for.
reviews.owner_response: Your review truly made our day! At OSR JEWELLERS, we pour our hearts into every piece we create, so hearing that you had such a positive experience is the greatest reward we could ask for. Thank you for trusting us with your jewelry needs. You aren't just a customer; you're part of our family now. We look forward to welcoming you back for many more sparkling. Thank you for choosing us—we can’t wait to see you again soon!.

The OSR JEWELLERS Team"

reviews.author: Toufeera Sulem
reviews.text: Jewellery holds a unique power—it’s not just about decoration, it’s about personal identity, memory, and expression. A fine piece combines artistry and craftsmanship: from the purity and hallmark of the metal, to the way stones are cut, set, and polished; every detail matters. Good jewellery strikes a balance between durability and beauty—durable enough to last through daily wear, yet elegant and delicate enough to elevate even simple outfits. It becomes more than an accessory when it holds sentimental value—an heirloom, a gift, a marker of a milestone. The versatility of jewellery is also part of its charm: a classic necklace, a bold ring, or subtle earrings can transform your look, mood, or confidence. Ultimately, the best jewellery is that which resonates with you—your style, your story, your taste—and makes you feel more yourself when you wear it.

reviews.author: Eesha K
reviews.text:
Firstly, variety is not good in the store, they should explore adding more styles and variants to expand the collection. Secondly, the quality of the items was not upto the mark as per the prices quoted.

Also, a humble request to refrain pressuring people to give a 5-star reviews in exchange of giving very cheap quality freebies. It is highly recommended to instead try to improve your services and collect genuine feedback from actual customers. I don't think I will be visiting the shop again after my sad experience but wishing you luck.

reviews.author: Shweta Bothra
reviews.text:
Very good collection, good staff. Found more jewellery than we intended for initially.
'Great jewelleries & Greater tea'
reviews.owner_response: Thank you so much for your glowing 5-star review - it truly made our day! We're absolutely thrilled to know you had such a wonderful experience with OSR JEWELLERS. Your appreciation for our craftsmanship and service means the world to us. Feedback like yours inspires us to continue curating timeless, high-quality pieces with love and passion. It's an absolute honour to have you as part of the OSR JEWELLERS family. We look forward to helping you discover many more beautiful pieces in the future. Thank you once again for your trust and support - it means everything to us!

reviews.author: Pallavi Sachdeva
reviews.text: The variety at the store is really amazing and the staff is very friendly. You will find all kind of ethnic , modern and traditional designs here. My suggestion do try the Jewellery from here
reviews.owner_response:
We're absolutely thrilled to hear that you loved your experience with OSR JEWELLERS! Your kind words mean the world to us, and we're grateful for customers like you who appreciate our passion for creating beautiful, high-quality jewelry.

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback and for giving us a perfect 5-star rating! We're honored to have you as a part of the OSR JEWELLERS family and can't wait to help you find your next favorite piece!

rating_comments:
had an absolutely wonderful experience at OSR Jewellers. From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel genuinely welcomed and valued. Their customer service is truly exceptional patient, knowledgeable, and never pushy. They took the time to understand exactly what I was looking for and showed me beautiful options.

What really stood out was their attention to detail and transparency while explaining the designs, quality, and pricing. The entire process felt smooth, comfortable, and trustworthy. It’s rare to find such a perfect balance of professionalism and warmth.

Highly recommend OSR Jewellers for anyone looking for stunning pieces and outstanding customer service. I will definitely be coming back!

Amazing place with such beautiful variety of jewellery, Kartik n his team were so warm n welcoming, felt like home. Would recomend everyone to visit atleast once, because, you're bound to visit again!
Thank you to the entire team at OSR jewellers for being so friendly n understanding the need n providing me with what I had come looking for.

The store offers a wide variety of jewellery that caters to all your requirements.Their product is of very high quality and carries 25 years if guarantee. In todays world that is pretty unique and that assurance is big enough for the customers, since in todays world no one really offerd that upfront service.The staff is equally helpful and courteous. Overall the store is a must visit.

The people here were very friendly and helpful. We came to find pieces for a wedding. Our colors were unusual and our time frame was short and the staff was incredibly accommodating. They helped us get a matching set for my outfit, and they also did custom pieces for us for the outfit with unique coloring. I would definitely recommend and would return!

Men friendly jewellery shopping. Way too patient , they've spent over 45 minutes and we ended up picking 2 pieces. A first time visit. We've also been given a gift .

Super happy ✌️✌️✌️
We came all the way from Punjab for the shopping , The collection is amazing , the staff is very sweet .kartik nayyar is excellent .jewellery is very well priced
Coming from the UK I have never seen any better jewellery brand ,they are super nice and exretemely well mannered .so happy to come here .bringing my whole family here next week

Went here based on my mother's request, had a great service experience. They took their time to listen to what I wanted and helped me customize bridal jewelry. I went for wedding day jewelry and ended up also buying an incredible piece for my reception too. I appreciate the time to customize a piece.
Best services, best chai, good pieces of all sorts of jewellery. Kartik hosts really well and has a great collection. Must visit.
“I had a great experience at this jewellery shop. The collection is beautiful and the staff is very polite and helpful. Highly recommended!”
